notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: Jose Fernandez steals (4) 2nd base. Lourdes Gurriel Jr. steals (1) home.

notableEvents.label: Nolan Arenado plunked
notableEvents.detail: Nolan Arenado hit by pitch. Geraldo Perdomo to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: James McCann GIDP
notableEvents.detail: James McCann grounds into a double play, second baseman Willi Castro to shortstop Ezequiel Tovar to first baseman TJ Rumfield. Jose Fernandez out at 2nd. James McCann out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Adrian Del Castillo pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Adrian Del Castillo flies out to center fielder Brenton Doyle.

notableEvents.label: Sterlin Thompson GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Sterlin Thompson grounds into a double play, second baseman Ildemaro Vargas to shortstop Geraldo Perdomo to first baseman Jose Fernandez. Ezequiel Tovar out at 2nd. Sterlin Thompson out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Mickey Moniak plunked
notableEvents.detail: Mickey Moniak hit by pitch. Brenton Doyle scores. TJ Rumfield to 3rd. Hunter Goodman to 2nd.
